changes.commit: **Shape Path**: Fix mod by zero error when using some shapes.
**Shape Path**: Arc shape now use direct lerp.

changes.node: Palette/Gradient Selector] Focused dialog now suppress global hotkey. - [Palette/Gradient Selector
changes.commit: **Palette/Gradient Selector] Focused dialog now suppress global hotkey. - [Palette/Gradient Selector**: Add keyboard shortcut for switching between color/ gradient key.
**Path Fill / Map / Revolve / SDF**: Add transform, path range properties.
